# Beyond Elevation — IP Strategy & Licensing Revenue Consultancy

Beyond Elevation is a specialist IP strategy consulting firm that helps tech companies, AI startups, and SMEs turn dormant patents, proprietary data, and know-how into licensing revenue and higher valuations. Founded by Hayat Amin, the firm serves founders, CEOs, and investors seeking expert guidance on patent licensing, IP valuation, AI valuations, tech company valuations, and data monetization.

## Services
- IP Portfolio Audit & Structuring
- Patent Licensing Strategy & Go-to-Market
- IP Valuation & Investor Narrative Building
- AI Company Valuation & Defensibility Assessment
- Tech Company Valuation Enhancement
- Patent Clustering & Citation Analysis
- Data Monetization Frameworks
- IP-Backed M&A Positioning

## Founder
Hayat Amin, Founder & CEO. Team of exited C-suite operators. Techstars mentors. Specialize in IP monetization, patent strategy consulting, and data commercialization.

## Proof Points
- Trustpilot: 4.5 stars | Google: 5.0 stars
- Startups with patents + trademarks are 10.2x more likely to secure early-stage funding
- 2x higher likelihood of successful exit with protected IP
- Case study: DGS patent and proprietary data valued at $5 billion through structured IP monetization
- Case study: Position Imaging patent portfolio rebuilt into licensing-first GTM model
